label: Clean Editorial
globalPrefix: premium editorial illustration, polished modern visual design
globalSuffix: clean shapes, controlled lighting, elegant composition, no text, no watermark

suspect.prefix: full-body character portrait, single person, centered framing, full figure visible
suspect.suffix: refined silhouette, premium wardrobe detail, clean readable face

evidence.prefix: forensic product-style evidence shot, single clear clue

featured.suffix: premium atmosphere, controlled detail, strong visual hierarchy

negativePrompts.global: text, logo, watermark, blurry, low resolution
negativePrompts.suspect: multiple people, cropped body, extra limbs
